name: r-dev
description: R package development conventions and guardrail hooks, packaged for per-project reuse. Ships an r-pkg-dev skill (R code style, dependencies, testing, documentation, lifecycle, plus agent-workflow efficiency guidance; the code-style and testing rules apply to any R work, the rest to packages) and guardrail hooks (air-format, R-code anti-patterns, pkgdown index, a full-test-suite gate and a roxygen-docs staleness gate before commit, and an R CMD check gate before push; the commit/push gates skip changes with no R-relevant content, and can be bypassed on demand with R_PKG_GATE_SKIP=1).
